ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state where the city is located */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Current mayor of the city */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_of_living" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost of living record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "mcmeal_price" REAL /* Price of a McMeal at McDonalds or equivalent combo meal */,
  "domestic_beer_price" REAL /* Price of a domestic beer (0.5 liter draught) */,
  "water_bottle_price" REAL /* Price of a 1.5 liter bottle of water */,
  "cappuccino_price" REAL /* Price of a regular cappuccino */,
  "apartment_city_centre" REAL /* Cost of a 1-bedroom apartment in the city center */,
  "apartment_outside_centre" REAL /* Cost of a 1-bedroom apartment outside the city center */,
  "basic_utilities_cost" REAL /* Basic utilities cost for an 85m2 apartment */,
  "internet_cost" REAL /* Cost of internet (60 Mbps or more, unlimited data, cable/ADSL) */,
  "fitness_club_cost" REAL /* Monthly fee for 1 adult at a fitness club */,
  "rent_index" REAL /* Rent index for the city */,
  "groceries_index" REAL /* Groceries index for the city */,
  "transportation_index" REAL /* Transportation index for the city */,
  "utilities_index" REAL /* Utilities index for the city */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_of_living_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_of_life_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality of life index record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index */,
  "purchasing_power_index" REAL /* Purchasing power index */,
  "safety_index" REAL /* Safety index */,
  "health_care_index" REAL /* Health care index */,
  "pollution_index" REAL /* Pollution index */,
  "logged_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Logged GDP per capita */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption */,
  "climate_index" REAL /* Climate index */,
  "green_space_index" REAL /* Green space index */,
  "noise_pollution_index" REAL /* Noise pollution index */,
  "crime_index" REAL /* Crime index */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_of_life_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "average_monthly_net_salary" REAL /* Average monthly net salary (after tax) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "startup_ecosystem" REAL /* Startup ecosystem index */,
  "tourism_index" REAL /* Tourism index */,
  "housing_index" REAL /* Housing index */,
  "transport_index" REAL /* Transport index */,
  "health_index" REAL /* Health index */,
  "food_index" REAL /* Food index */,
  "internet_speed_index" REAL /* Internet speed index */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the city */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate in the city */,
  "export_volume" REAL /* Export volume of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultural_and_social_factors" (
  "cultural_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural and social factor record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "access_to_contraception" REAL /* Access to contraception */,
  "gender_equality" REAL /* Gender equality */,
  "immigration_tolerance" REAL /* Immigration tolerance */,
  "lgbt_friendly" REAL /* LGBT friendly */,
  "nightscene_index" REAL /* Nightscene index */,
  "beer_index" REAL /* Beer index */,
  "festival_index" REAL /* Festival index */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the city */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Primary religion practiced in the city */,
  "cultural_events" INTEGER /* Number of cultural events held in the city per year */,
  "social_benefits" TEXT /* Social benefits available in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cultural_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultural_and_social_factors_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, planner, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, market research) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, market research) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_data_source" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_source_link" TEXT /* Link to the data source for the city */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_data_source_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_data_source_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the city */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., quality of life, cost of living) */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_ratings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_images_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the city */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of keyword (e.g., location, feature) */,
  "keyword_relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the keyword to the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_keywords_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_category" TEXT /* Category of the review (e.g., quality of life, cost of living) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_reviews_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the city as a favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the city was marked as a favorite */,
  "favorite_category" TEXT /* Category of the favorite (e.g., city, location) */,
  "favorite_comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user with the favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_favorites_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "city_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first city in the comparison */,
  "city_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second city in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_category" TEXT /* Category of the comparison (e.g., quality of life, cost of living) */,
  "comparison_comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user with the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_comparisons_city_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("city_id2") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_comparisons_city_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("city_id1") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
